'''âth-d-y''' ('''thadaya''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mom|mom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mom|mom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-d-y
|-
! Lemma
| thadaya
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadayithi|thadayithi]] || [[word:thadayiji|thadayiji]] || [[word:thadayishi|thadayishi]] || [[word:thadayi|thadayi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadayuthuth|thadayuthuth]] || [[word:thadayujuj|thadayujuj]] || [[word:thadayushush|thadayushush]] || [[word:thaday|thaday]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadayuthu|thadayuthu]] || [[word:thadayuju|thadayuju]] || [[word:thadayushu|thadayushu]] || [[word:thadayu|thadayu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadayufuth|thadayufuth]] || [[word:thadayufuj|thadayufuj]] || [[word:thadayufush|thadayufush]] || [[word:thadayuf|thadayuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadayethe|thadayethe]] || [[word:thadayeje|thadayeje]] || [[word:thadayeshe|thadayeshe]] || [[word:thadaye|thadaye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadayothoth|thadayothoth]] || [[word:thadayojoj|thadayojoj]] || [[word:thadayoshosh|thadayoshosh]] || [[word:thaday|thaday]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadayotho|thadayotho]] || [[word:thadayojo|thadayojo]] || [[word:thadayosho|thadayosho]] || [[word:thadayo|thadayo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadayofoth|thadayofoth]] || [[word:thadayofoj|thadayofoj]] || [[word:thadayofosh|thadayofosh]] || [[word:thadayof|thadayof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thadayĂŠthĂŠ|thadayĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thadayĂŠjĂŠ|thadayĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thadayĂŠshĂŠ|thadayĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thadayĂŠ|thadayĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thadayathath|thadayathath]] || [[word:thadayajaj|thadayajaj]] || [[word:thadayashash|thadayashash]] || [[word:thaday|thaday]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadayatha|thadayatha]] || [[word:thadayaja|thadayaja]] || [[word:thadayasha|thadayasha]] || [[word:thadaya|thadaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadayafath|thadayafath]] || [[word:thadayafaj|thadayafaj]] || [[word:thadayafash|thadayafash]] || [[word:thadayaf|thadayaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:thadayasha|thadayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gothadayasha|gothadayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokithadayasha|gokithadayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:thadaynĂŒsha|thadaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gothadaynknĂŒsha|gothadaynknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokithadaynĂŒsha|gokithadaynĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thadayshĂ«sha|thadayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothadaynkshĂ«sha|gothadaynkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithadayshĂ«sha|gokithadayshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadayrosha|thadayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadaynkrosha|gothadaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadayrosha|gokithadayrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thadaymusha|thadaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadaynkmusha|gothadaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadaymusha|gokithadaymusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:thadaysherasha|thadaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gothadaynksherasha|gothadaynksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokithadaysherasha|gokithadaysherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:thadayngasha|thadayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gothadaynkngasha|gothadaynkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokithadayngasha|gokithadayngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thadayasha|thadayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothadaynkyasha|gothadaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokithadayasha|gokithadayasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:thadayamasha|thadayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gothadaynkyamasha|gothadaynkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokithadayamasha|gokithadayamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadaynĂŒshĂ«sha|thadaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadaynknĂŒshĂ«sha|gothadaynknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadaynĂŒshĂ«sha|gokithadaynĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadaynĂŒrosha|thadaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadaynknĂŒrosha|gothadaynknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadaynĂŒrosha|gokithadaynĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadaynĂŒmusha|thadaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadaynknĂŒmusha|gothadaynknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadaynĂŒmusha|gokithadaynĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadayshĂ«nĂŒsha|thadayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gothadaynkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadayshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokithadayshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadayshĂ«rosha|thadayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadaynkshĂ«rosha|gothadaynkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadayshĂ«rosha|gokithadayshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadayshĂ«musha|thadayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadaynkshĂ«musha|gothadaynkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadayshĂ«musha|gokithadayshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadayronĂŒsha|thadayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadaynkronĂŒsha|gothadaynkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadayronĂŒsha|gokithadayronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadayroshĂ«sha|thadayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadaynkroshĂ«sha|gothadaynkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadayroshĂ«sha|gokithadayroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thadayromusha|thadayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothadaynkromusha|gothadaynkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithadayromusha|gokithadayromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:thadaymunĂŒsha|thadaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gothadaynkmunĂŒsha|gothadaynkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokithadaymunĂŒsha|gokithadaymunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:thadaymushĂ«sha|thadaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gothadaynkmushĂ«sha|gothadaynkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokithadaymushĂ«sha|gokithadaymushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:thadaymurosha|thadaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothadaynkmurosha|gothadaynkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokithadaymurosha|gokithadaymurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:thaday|thaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:thĂŠdĂŠy|thĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hothaday|hothaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hothĂŠdĂŠy|hothĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothaday|hohothaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohothĂŠdĂŠy|hohothĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒthaday|nĂŒthaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒthĂŠdĂŠy|nĂŒthĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒthaday|nĂŒnĂŒthaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒthĂŠdĂŠy|nĂŒnĂŒthĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻthaday|nĂŻthaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻthĂŠdĂŠy|nĂŻthĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻthaday|nĂŻnĂŻthaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻthĂŠdĂŠy|nĂŻnĂŻthĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luthaday|luthaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luthĂŠdĂŠy|luthĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthaday|luluthaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluthĂŠdĂŠy|luluthĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lithaday|lithaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lithĂŠdĂŠy|lithĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithaday|lilithaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilithĂŠdĂŠy|lilithĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kothaday|kothaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kothĂŠdĂŠy|kothĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothaday|kokothaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokothĂŠdĂŠy|kokothĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kethaday|kethaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kethĂŠdĂŠy|kethĂŠdĂŠy]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethaday|kekethaday]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekethĂŠdĂŠy|kekethĂŠdĂŠy]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
